General.Name: Nanshan Aluminium Intl Hldg
General.Description: Nanshan Aluminium International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the production and sale of alumina in Malaysia, Hong Kong, Singapore, Indonesia, and South Korea. The company offers alumina, including aluminium hydroxide. It also involved in the provision of management consultation services. It serves aluminium producers and commodity traders for manufacturing electrolytic aluminium. Nanshan Aluminium International Holdings Limited was founded in 2017 and is based in Bintan, Indonesia. Nanshan Aluminium International Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Nanshan Aluminium Investment Holding Limited.
General.Address: The Special Economic Zone of Galang Batang village of Gunung Kijang, Bintan, Indonesia, 29153
